meaning: <主方>vt.称赞,赞美,吹捧 ;vi.自夸 趾高气扬
examples: For once Roose Bolton's voice was loud enough to carry.
Roose Bolton had posted guards at the kitchen door. With so many mouths to feed, every scrap of food was precious.
Over at New York magazine, Kevin Roose came closest to ringing the bell.
Warren was elected to the Senate because of her hard line approach to Wall Street, Roose writes.
Kevin Roose at the New York Times recounted recently how Citi is winding down is prop trading effective Feb. 6.
